title: Something More
profile: You are corresponding with Rowan Godfrey, an old friend who you have grown more fond of recently, to the point that you wish to declare your love.
The line of friend and lover can be a precarious one and you do not wish to lose Rowan as a friend.

rulesOfCorrespondence.description: You know Rowan very well, so gain an extra die in Language for this letter.

consequences.text: You receive a letter saying that Rowan is leaving the country, although it doesn't mention a reason. You receive no further correspondence.
You receive a reply, but Rowan just wants to remain friends. You soon grow apart, but see each other on occasion, although it is awkward.
Rowan writes a relieved letter explaining that the feelings are mutual.
Rowan is ecstatic and immediately begins planning a wedding.
